name: TUNAG
description: Stamps Japanese employee engagement platform — internal social feed, recognition, surveys with integration APIs.

seo.title: TUNAG — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: TUNAG: Stamps Japanese employee engagement platform — internal social feed, recognition, surveys with integration APIs.

when_to_use: Employee recognition feed for a Japanese frontline workforce
Internal social platform improving engagement for retail staff
Employee surveys with integration APIs for HR systems
Digital employee communication replacing intranet for SMBs
TUNAG-Slack integration for employee engagement automation

pros: Recognition and social feed in one app
APIs integrate with JP HR systems
Strong adoption in large JP enterprises
cons: Outside Japan the cultural fit weakens
Limited vs global tools like Workday or Culture Amp
Content depends on manager engagement to work
review.verdict: Leading JP employee engagement app; not a global alternative to Culture Amp or Lattice.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises improving internal communication culture
review.not_for: Global HR teams needing multi-language engagement tools

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
